- 设备暂时离线或未向网关上报数据  
- 该设备的状态查询需要先在网关上激活对应的节点（如 `QueryTemp`、`QueryHumidity`）

如需进一步操作（例如查看、复制、移动到其他目录，或读取其中的文字信息），请告诉我具体需求，我会立即为您执行。
reasoning_content: The file "登记单.png" exists. The user said "我的下载目录有张 登记单.png". Perhaps they want to view or maybe extract info. We cannot display image directly but can maybe return a link path. We could provide the absolute path. Could also read file? There's no file_read for binary images; reading will output binary maybe. Maybe we can provide path and ask what to do. But guidelines: only ask if ambiguous. The user didn't ask a question. Probably they want to know its path or open it. We can respond with file path and offer to open (download) or show preview? Provide the location: "/Users/jiangguishun/Downloads/登记单.png". Possibly they want to embed in chat? We can give a markdown linking to file, but not sure if front-end supports. We'll provide link as file:// path. Also ask if need further action (e.g., copy, move).
